subtasks.description: Extract contract renewal dates, license counts, and vendor details from SAM system documents
Query SQL warehouse for license consumption trends (usage over last 90 days, peak utilization, variance patterns)
Reconcile SAM renewal data with consumption trends, classify renewal risk (high/medium/low based on upcoming expiry + usage patterns), and generate alert recommendations for procurement
Generate renewal alert notifications with risk classification, consumption insights, and recommended actions for procurement team

plan.cost_rationale: Minimum 4 subtasks required for end-to-end workflow: (1) Extract renewal dates from SAM (extract, small — straightforward document field retrieval). (2) Query consumption trends from SQL (sql_gen, mid — multi-table joins across usage logs with aggregation). (3) Cross-reconcile renewal + consumption data, assess risk signals, and classify renewal posture (cross_recon, frontier — multi-signal reconciliation with classification logic requires highest capability). (4) Invoke notification tools from registry to alert procurement (multitool_plan, mid — orchestrates email/Slack/ticketing tools). Tiers justified: small for SAM extraction (no inference), mid for SQL (standard aggregation complexity), frontier for risk assessment (reconciles two sources with rule-based classification), mid for notifications (straightforward tool orchestration from known registry).

output.sql: SELECT license_id, publisher, product, SUM(amount_usd) AS total_spend_usd, AVG(daily_active_seats) AS avg_daily_active_seats, MAX(daily_active_seats) AS peak_daily_active_seats, MIN(daily_active_seats) AS min_daily_active_seats, MAX(daily_active_seats) - MIN(daily_active_seats) AS seat_variance, COUNT(DISTINCT event_date) AS active_days, ROUND(100.0 * AVG(daily_active_seats) / NULLIF(MAX(daily_active_seats), 0), 2) AS avg_utilization_pct, STDDEV(daily_active_seats) AS seat_stddev, CASE WHEN MAX(daily_active_seats) > 0 AND ROUND(100.0 * AVG(daily_active_seats) / NULLIF(MAX(daily_active_seats), 0), 2) < 50 THEN 'LOW_UTILIZATION_RISK' WHEN MAX(daily_active_seats) > 0 AND ROUND(100.0 * AVG(daily_active_seats) / NULLIF(MAX(daily_active_seats), 0), 2) BETWEEN 50 AND 79 THEN 'MODERATE_UTILIZATION' WHEN MAX(daily_active_seats) > 0 AND ROUND(100.0 * AVG(daily_active_seats) / NULLIF(MAX(daily_active_seats), 0), 2) >= 80 THEN 'HIGH_UTILIZATION_RENEWAL_CANDIDATE' ELSE 'INSUFFICIENT_DATA' END AS renewal_risk_flag, MIN(event_date) AS period_start, MAX(event_date) AS period_end FROM consumption_facts WHERE event_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '90 days' AND event_date < CURRENT_DATE GROUP BY license_id, publisher, product ORDER BY avg_utilization_pct ASC, total_spend_usd DESC
